note: Scratch arm policy with one continuous kinematic motion reward: no explicit standing posture angle, no low-speed still threshold, cross-lateral side arm lift. Command: KinematicScratchCrossSide: checkpoint=null; old shoulder style and arm energy rewards disabled; pitch target from abs(vx_cmd)*left-right foot x distance; side roll target cross-coupled so right leg outward raises left arm and left leg outward raises right arm.
